Determines if the water interacts with the Trigger device.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.Enable During Phase.De: Determines the game phases during which the device will be enabled. Pre-Game includes all phases prior to the Game starting (the waiting for players lobby on Featured Islands and the Game Start Countdown).
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.Vertical Emptying Spee: Determines the rate, in tiles per minute, at which the water empties vertically.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.Vertical Filling Speed: Determines the rate, in tiles per minute, at which the water fills vertically.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Water_Device_C.Disable.Description: Disable the device when a signal is received from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Water_Device_C.Enable.Description: Enable the device when a signal is received from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Water_Device_C.Reset Water.Descriptio: Reset the water filling to its default Vertical Water Percentage when receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.Reset Water.Descriptio: Reset the water filling to its default Vertical Water Percentage.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Water_Device_C.Resume Vertical Moveme: Resumes the last vertical movement when a signal is received from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.Zone Depth.Description: Set the depth of the volume in tiles.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.Zone Height.Descriptio: Set the height of the volume in tiles.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.Zone Width.Description: Set the width of the volume in tiles.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.Default Vertical Water: Sets the default vertical water level to the specified percentage of the Water Height.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Water_Device_C.Start Vertical Emptyin: Start the vertical emptying of the water volume when a signal is received from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.Start Vertical Emptyin: Start the vertical emptying of the water volume.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Water_Device_C.Start Vertical Filling: Start the vertical filling of the water volume when a signal is received from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.Start Vertical Filling: Start the vertical filling of the water volume.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Water_Device_C.Stop Vertical Movement: Stop the vertical filling or emptying of the water volume when a signal is received from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.Stop Vertical Movement: Stop the vertical filling or emptying of the water volume.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.On Player Entering Wat: When a player enters the water, sends an event to linked devices,
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Water_Device_C.On Player Entering Wat: When a player enters the water, transmit on this channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.On Player Leaving Wate: When a player leaves the water, sends an event to linked devices,
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Water_Device_C.On Player Leaving Wate: When a player leaves the water, transmit on this channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.On Vertical Emptying C: When the water's vertical emptying is completed (Vertical Water Percentage = 0%), sends an event to linked devices,
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Water_Device_C.On Vertical Emptying C: When the water's vertical emptying is completed (Vertical Water Percentage = 0%), transmit on this channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Water_V2_C.On Vertical Filling Co: When the water's vertical filling is completed (Vertical Water Percentage = 100%), sends an event to linked devices,
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Water_Device_C.On Vertical Filling Co: When the water's vertical filling is completed (Vertical Water Percentage = 100%), transmit on this channel.
